response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and open-source development experience with a focus on web, mobile, and desktop systems, but lacks direct embedded firmware or LAN-switch security experience. His C/C++ background and Linux familiarity are relevant, though his recent work leans heavily toward higher-level languages (TypeScript, Node.js). Native-level Japanese proficiency is missing, which is a hard requirement for this role.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (10+ years) with a focus on testability and craftsmanship.
Strong C/C++ background from roles at National Instruments and embedded-adjacent projects (e.g., Sound Position Server).
Proven ability to collaborate across teams and domains (e.g., hardware integration at Altom Consulting).
concerns: No demonstrated experience with embedded firmware for networking/security hardware (e.g., LAN switches, MACsec, 802.1X).
Lacks native-level Japanese proficiency, a strict requirement for the role.
Recent work (Stripe, Shopify) focuses on high-level languages (TypeScript, Node.js) rather than low-level systems programming.
